question: Tell me about the Acme R2 robot launch announcement.

messages.content: Tell me about the Acme R2 robot launch announcement.

messages.name: fetch_url
messages.content:
# Acme R2 Launch Announcement

Acme Robotics is proud to announce the R2, our next-generation mobile manipulation platform. The R2 features improved payload capacity of 8 kg, extended runtime of 9 hours, and native ROS 2 Iron support.

args.answer: Acme Robotics announced the R2 as their next-generation mobile manipulation platform, featuring an 8 kg payload capacity, 9 hours of runtime, and native ROS 2 Iron support.

final_answer: Acme Robotics announced the R2 as their next-generation mobile manipulation platform, featuring an 8 kg payload capacity, 9 hours of runtime, and native ROS 2 Iron support.
